N. R. PATEL ARNOLD W. EVJE II, ESQ. VS. GEORGE JAMES OLIVER IN PRO PER 10:00 A.M. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ALL PARTIES PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT, GEORGE JAMES OLIVER. THE COURT TAKES JUDICIAL NOTICE OF THE TIME A PLACE FOR TRIAL. PLTF'S. WITNESS, N. R. PATEL, SWORN AND EXAMINED ON DIRECT. EXHIBIT #1, THREE DAY NOTICE TO PAY RENT OR QUIT DATED 8/15/93 THROUGH 9/1/93, I.D. AND EVID. NOTHING FURTHER. WITNESS EXCUSED FROM STAND. THE COURT AFTER HEARING THE TESTIMONY AND RECEIVING THE EVIDENCE ORDERED JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF AGAINST DEFENDANT GEORGE JAMES OLIVER FOR RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISE AT #74 SIXTH ST. #525 SAN FRANCISCO, CA, FORFEITURE OF THE LEASE AGREEMENT, AND PRINCIPAL OF $433.45 REPRESENTING $303.45 UNLAWFUL DETAINER DAMAGES AND $130.00 BACK RENT, PLUS COST PER COST BILL.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT OLIVER, GEORGE JAMES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 74 SIXTH STREET #525 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $433.45 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $433.45, LEASE FORFEITED, NO ATTORNEY FEES. COST GRANTED PER COST BILL.
